dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic.short_description: A dummy module for the sonic action plugin

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_api.short_description: Manages REST operations on devices running Enterprise SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_api.description: Manages REST operations on devices running Enterprise SONiC Distribution by Dell Technologies. This module provides an implementation for working with SONiC REST operations in a deterministic way.

url.description: The HTTP path of the request after

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp.short_description: Manage global BGP and its parameters
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp.description: This module provides configuration management of global BGP parameters on devices running Enterprise SONiC Distribution by Dell Technologies.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp_af.short_description: Manage global BGP address-family and its parameters
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp_af.description: This module provides configuration management of global BGP_AF parameters on devices running Enterprise SONiC. bgp_as and vrf_name must be created in advance on the device.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp_as_pa.short_description: Manage BGP autonomous system path (or as-path-list) and its parameters
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp_as_pa.description: This module provides configuration management of BGP bgp_as_paths for devices running Enterprise SONiC Distribution by Dell Technologies.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp_commu.short_description: Manage BGP community and its parameters
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp_commu.description: This module provides configuration management of BGP bgp_communities for device running Enterprise SONiC Distribution by Dell Technologies.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp_ext_c.short_description: Manage BGP extended community-list and its parameters
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp_ext_c.description: This module provides configuration management of BGP extcommunity-list for devices running Enterprise SONiC Distribution by Dell Technologies.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp_neigh.short_description: Manage a BGP neighbor and its parameters
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp_neigh.description: This module provides configuration management of global BGP_NEIGHBORS parameters on devices running Enterprise SONiC. bgp_as and vrf_name must be created on the device in advance.

config.description: Specifies the BGP neighbors related configuration.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp_neigh.short_description: Manage the BGP neighbor address-family and its parameters
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_bgp_neigh.description: This module provides configuration management of BGP neighbors address-family parameters on devices running Enterprise SONiC. bgp_as, vrf_name and neighbors need be created in advance on the device.

config.description: Specifies the BGP neighbors address-family related configuration.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_command.short_description: Runs commands on devices running Enterprise SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_command.description: Runs commands on remote devices running Enterprise SONiC Distribution by Dell Technologies. Sends arbitrary commands to an Enterprise SONiC node and returns the results that are read from the device. This module includes an argument that causes the module to wait for a specific condition before returning or time out if the condition is not met. This module does not support running commands in configuration mode. To configure SONiC devices, use M(dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_config).

commands.description: List of commands to send to the remote Enterprise SONiC devices over the configured provider. The resulting output from the command is returned. If the I(wait_for) argument is provided, the module is not returned until the condition is satisfied or the number of retries has expired. If a command sent to the device requires answering a prompt, it is possible to pass a dict containing I(command), I(answer) and I(prompt). Common answers are

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_drop_coun.short_description: Manage drop counter configuration on SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_drop_coun.description: This module provides configuration management of drop counter for devices running SONiC

state.description: The state of the configuration after module completion

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_ecmp_load.short_description: IP ECMP load share mode configuration handling for SONiC.
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_ecmp_load.description: This module provides configuration management for IP ECMP load share mode on devices running SONiC.

config.description: IP ECMP load share mode configuration.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_facts.short_description: Collects facts on devices running Enterprise SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_facts.description: Collects facts from devices running Enterprise SONiC Distribution by Dell Technologies. This module places the facts gathered in the fact tree keyed by the respective resource name. The facts module always collects a base set of facts from the device and can enable or disable collection of additional facts.

gather_subset.description: When supplied, this argument restricts the facts collected to a given subset. Possible values for this argument include all, min, hardware, config, legacy, and interfaces. Can specify a list of values to include a larger subset. Values can also be used with an initial

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_fbs_class.short_description: Manage flow based services (FBS) classifiers configuration on SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_fbs_class.description: This module provides configuration management of FBS classifiers for devices running SONiC

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_interface.short_description: Configure Interface attributes on interfaces such as, Eth, LAG, VLAN, and loopback. (create a loopback interface if it does not exist.)
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_interface.description: Configure Interface attributes such as, MTU, admin statu, and so on, on interfaces such as, Eth, LAG, VLAN, and loopback. (create a loopback interface if it does not exist.)

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_ip_neighb.short_description: Manage IP neighbor global configuration on SONiC.
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_ip_neighb.description: This module provides configuration management of IP neighbor global for devices running SONiC.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_l2_interf.short_description: Configure interface-to-VLAN association that is based on access or trunk mode
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_l2_interf.description: Manages Layer 2 interface attributes of Enterprise SONiC Distribution by Dell Technologies.

config.description: A list of Layer 2 interface configurations.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_l3_interf.short_description: Configure the IPv4 and IPv6 parameters on Interfaces such as, Eth, LAG, VLAN, and loopback
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_l3_interf.description: Configures Layer 3 interface settings on devices running Enterprise SONiC Distribution by Dell Technologies. This module provides configuration management of IPv4 and IPv6 parameters on Ethernet interfaces of devices running Enterprise SONiC.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_lag_inter.short_description: Manage link aggregation group (LAG) interface parameters
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_lag_inter.description: This module manages attributes of link aggregation group (LAG) interfaces of devices running Enterprise SONiC Distribution by Dell Technologies.

config.description: A list of LAG configurations. I(adv_speed) and I(speed) are mutually exclusive.

state.description: The state that the configuration should be left in.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_logging.description: This module provides configuration management of logging for devices running SONiC.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_login_loc.short_description: Manage Global Login Lockout configurations on SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_login_loc.description: This module provides configuration management of login lockout parameters. Login Lockout feature is to lock out the user account for user-lockout-period after the max-retry failed attempts. Console exempt option can be enabled to skip the login lockout validations for console users.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_mclag.short_description: Manage multi chassis link aggregation groups domain (MCLAG) and its parameters
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_mclag.description: Manage multi chassis link aggregation groups domain (MCLAG) and its parameters.

state.description: The state that the configuration should be left in.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_mfa.short_description: Manage Multi-factor authentication (MFA) configurations on SONiC.
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_mfa.description: This module provides configuration management of MFA parameters for devices running SONiC. Pre-configured host cert is required for MFA security profile, and ca-cert for RSA/CAC-PIV security profiles.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_mgmt_serv.short_description: Manage management servers configuration on SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_mgmt_serv.description: This module provides configuration management of management servers for devices running SONiC

state.description: The state of the configuration after module completion.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_ntp.description: This module provides configuration management of NTP for devices running SONiC.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_ospf_area.description: This module provides configuration for the area settings of OSPF running on SONiC switches

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_pim_globa.short_description: Manage global PIM configurations on SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_pim_globa.description: This module provides configuration management of global PIM parameters for devices running SONiC. VRF and prefix-list need to be created earlier in the device.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_pim_inter.short_description: Manage interface-specific PIM configurations on SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_pim_inter.description: This module provides configuration management of interface-specific PIM parameters for devices running SONiC. BFD profiles need to be created earlier in the device.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_port_grou.short_description: Manages port group configuration on SONiC.
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_port_grou.description: This module provides configuration management of port group for devices running SONiC.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_qos_buffe.short_description: Manage QoS buffer configuration on SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_qos_buffe.description: This module provides configuration management of QoS buffer for devices running SONiC

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_qos_inter.short_description: Manage QoS interfaces configuration on SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_qos_inter.description: This module provides configuration management of QoS interfaces for devices running SONiC

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_qos_maps.short_description: Manage QoS maps configuration on SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_qos_maps.description: This module provides configuration management of QoS maps for devices running SONiC

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_qos_pfc.short_description: Manage QoS PFC configuration on SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_qos_pfc.description: This module provides configuration management of QoS PFC for devices running SONiC

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_qos_wred.short_description: Manage QoS WRED profiles configuration on SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_qos_wred.description: This module provides configuration management of QoS WRED profiles for devices running SONiC

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_roce.short_description: Manage RoCE QoS configuration on SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_roce.description: This module provides configuration management of RoCE(v2) QoS for devices running SONiC

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_sflow.description: This module provides configuration for sflow sampling on devices running SONiC

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_static_ro.short_description: Manage static routes configuration on SONiC
dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_static_ro.description: This module provides configuration management of static routes for devices running SONiC

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_system.description: This module is used for configuration management of global system parameters on devices running Enterprise SONiC.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_users.description: This module provides configuration management of users parameters on devices running Enterprise SONiC.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_vlans.description: This module provides configuration management of VLANs parameters on devices running Enterprise SONiC Distribution by Dell Technologies.

dellemc.enterprise_sonic.sonic_vxlans.description: This module provides configuration management of VXLAN for devices running SONiC

state.description: The state of the configuration after module completion
